title: cleanup: fix moved app URLs, remove 13 dead entries
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Pruning the community garden
gist.blurb: We did some light pruning in the community showcase, updating moved links and clearing out dead URLs to keep the garden fresh and reliable.
gist.summary: Cleaned up the community apps showcase by updating moved repository URLs and removing inactive entries.
gist.impact: Visitors exploring the showcase will experience fewer broken links, ensuring a smoother discovery process for community projects.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener, pruning dead leaves (dead links) from a healthy code-plant, while the Nomnom creature happily eats the discarded leaves to keep the garden clean.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, pruning dead leaves from a glowing code-plant in a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats the discarded brown leaves. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
